ddls:
CREATE TABLE "enzymes" (
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enzyme */,
  "enzyme_name" TEXT /* Name of the enzyme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enzyme */,
  "enzyme_type" TEXT /* Type of enzyme (e.g., hydrolase, oxidoreductase) */,
  "source_organism" TEXT /* Organism from which the enzyme is derived */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* DNA or amino acid sequence of the enzyme */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the enzyme */,
  "pH_optimum" REAL /* Optimal pH for enzyme activity */,
  "temperature_optimum" REAL /* Optimal temperature for enzyme activity */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability of the enzyme under different conditions */,
  "references" TEXT /* List of research papers or references where the enzyme is studied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "enzyme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enzyme the sample belongs to */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., lab, field, commercial) */,
  "sample_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the sample */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample is stored */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_enzyme_id FOREIGN KEY ("enzyme_id") REFERENCES enzymes ("enzyme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kinetic_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the parameters belong to */,
  "vmax" REAL /* Maximum velocity (Vmax) */,
  "vmax_se" REAL /* Standard error of Vmax */,
  "km" REAL /* Michaelis-Menten constant (Km) */,
  "km_se" REAL /* Standard error of Km */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to determine the kinetic parameters (e.g., Lineweaver-Burk, Michaelis-Menten) */,
  "enzyme_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the enzyme used in the experiment */,
  "substrate_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the substrate used in the experiment */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "replicates" INTEGER /* Number of replicates in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kinetic_parameters_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inhibition_data" (
  "inhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inhibition data point */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the data belongs to */,
  "ki" REAL /* Inhibition constant (Ki) */,
  "ki_se" REAL /* Standard error of Ki */,
  "inhibitor_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of inhibitor */,
  "inhibitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the inhibitor used */,
  "inhibitor_type" TEXT /* Type of inhibitor (e.g., competitive, non-competitive) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to determine the inhibition data */,
  "enzyme_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the enzyme used in the experiment */,
  "substrate_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the substrate used in the experiment */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "replicates" INTEGER /* Number of replicates in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inhibition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inhibition_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rmax_data" (
  "rmax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Rmax data point */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the data belongs to */,
  "rmax" REAL /* Maximum rate of reaction (Rmax) */,
  "rmax_se" REAL /* Standard error of Rmax */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to determine the Rmax data */,
  "enzyme_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the enzyme used in the experiment */,
  "substrate_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the substrate used in the experiment */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "replicates" INTEGER /* Number of replicates in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rmax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rmax_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "srmax_data" (
  "srmax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SRmax data point */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the data belongs to */,
  "srmax" REAL /* Specific rate of reaction (SRmax) */,
  "srmax_se" REAL /* Standard error of SRmax */,
  "srmax05" REAL /* SRmax at 0.5 substrate concentration */,
  "srmax05highs" REAL /* SRmax at high substrate concentration */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to determine the SRmax data */,
  "enzyme_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the enzyme used in the experiment */,
  "substrate_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the substrate used in the experiment */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "replicates" INTEGER /* Number of replicates in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("srmax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_srmax_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inhibition_summary" (
  "inhibition_summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inhibition summary */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the summary belongs to */,
  "sinhibition" INTEGER /* Whether the sample shows significant inhibition */,
  "inhbetter_aov_pvalue" REAL /* P-value for inhibition */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to determine the inhibition summary */,
  "enzyme_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the enzyme used in the experiment */,
  "substrate_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the substrate used in the experiment */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the experiment was conducted */,
  "replicates" INTEGER /* Number of replicates in the experiment */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the inhibition summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inhibition_summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inhibition_summary_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
